server.name: conveyor-orchestrator-telemetry
server.description: AGV Telemetry Server providing status and health updates of the automated guided vehicle fleet.

tools.name: list_available_agvs
tools.description: Retrieve the real-time status and battery levels of all active Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) in the fleet.

tools.name: get_agv_vitals
tools.description: Retrieve detailed real-time health, battery status, and notes for a specific Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV).

bot_id.description: The unique identifier of the AGV (e.g., 'PickerBot-Alpha', 'PickerBot-Beta', 'PickerBot-Gamma').
